## Change summary

Describe the public claim, route, object, or policy changed by this pull request.

## Rights and publication gate

- [ ] The owner and authors of every new original asset are identified.
- [ ] Third-party code, text, images, fonts, media, data, and marks are documented with source, permission, license, and attribution.
- [ ] No confidential, client, personal, credential, security-sensitive, trade-secret, or private research material is included.
- [ ] Patent-sensitive material has a recorded filing, trade-secret, defensive-publication, or routine-publication decision.
- [ ] New names, logos, package names, domains, and product marks have a clearance record.
- [ ] The registered trademark symbol is not used without completed registration.
- [ ] Public claims have an evidence path and declared limitations.
- [ ] Copyright, trademark, Legal / IP, and public/private boundary notices remain accurate.
- [ ] No U+2013 or U+2014 long dash character is present.
- [ ] The site quality, editorial, and IP notice checks pass.

## Current ownership

Unless a specific file or written agreement identifies another owner, current
Final Prime rights remain owned by Daniel Kenessy in an individual capacity.
A company transfer requires a separate signed assignment.
